description:
## app [1.12.9](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.8...v1.12.9) (2026-03-29)


### Bug Fixes

* Switch to silva-patcher:1.3.3 (app.silva.patcher.* namespace) matching compiled silva-patches
* Fix sources loading stuck screen — patch updates now fetched from SilvaTechB/silva-patches GitHub releases directly, bypassing api.morphe.software
* Fall back to static patches-bundle.json when GitHub releases are unavailable

### UI

* Redesigned home screen header with Silva "S" logo mark and cleaner typography
* Redesigned app cards with clean dark surface and left accent bar
